title: pyrus newtoniana
intro: Pyrus newtoniana, also known as the Newton's pear or Himalayan pear, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. It is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pyrus newtoniana include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and act as an immune system booster. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
